/usr/lib64/ccache/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/indigo_tui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/indigo_tui.dir/main_tui.c.o -o ../bin/indigo_tui  -Wl,-rpath,/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/indigo_core:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/tui:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/event_flags:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/queue:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/mempool:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/hash_table:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/binary_tree:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/config:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/crypto libs/indigo_core/libindigo_core.so libs/tui/libtui.so -lncursesw libs/utilities/crypto/libcrypto_utils.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/event_flags:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/queue:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/mempool:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/hash_table:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/binary_tree:/home/constantin/Projects/indigo/out/Debug/src/libs/utilities/config
